title: Positive flow: Compose email to Kylie
preconditions: The app is open and the user is logged in. | The user is on the form screen for composing an email to Kylie.
test_data: kylie@example.com | John Doe | Hello Kylie, how are you?
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the form screen for composing an email to Kylie. | Enter 'kylie@example.com' in the 'Email' field. | Enter 'John Doe' in the 'Your Name' field. | Enter 'Hello Kylie, how are you?' in the 'Your Message' field. | Click the 'SEND' button.
expected_result: The email is sent successfully to Kylie with the provided details.

title: Negative flow: Empty fields
preconditions: The app is open and the user is logged in. | The user is on the form screen for composing an email to Kylie.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the form screen for composing an email to Kylie. | Leave all fields empty. | Click the 'SEND' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all fields are required.
